_notes: ESP32-C3 RISC-V single-core, WiFi 2.4GHz + BLE 5.0. ADC on GPIO 0-4; the XIAO exposes only GPIO 2/3/4/5 to header pins (D0-D3, all on ADC1). Native USB-Serial-JTAG (CDC class) on the C3 means you can flash/debug straight over USB without a separate USB-serial chip. Silkscreen labels D0-D10 are Arduino aliases mapping to underlying GPIO numbers. External ceramic antenna + U.FL connector on the bottom.
name: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-C3
gpio_numbering: GPIOn (silkscreen labels D0-D10 are Arduino aliases)
special: External ceramic antenna + U.FL switch jumper for diversity
LiPo battery charging IC (3.7V pads on the back, no JST)
